title: Heavy Duty 1/8" Classifier Screen Sieve w/ Handles 5 Gallon Bucket Deep Stacking

aspects.California Prop 65 Warning: WARNING: This product can expose you to chemicals including bisphenol_a_(bpa), which is known to the State of California to cause cancer, birth defects or other reproductive harm. For more information, go to: www.P65Warnings.ca.gov - About California Proposition 65 Proposition 65, officially the Safe Drinking Water and Toxic Enforcement Act of 1986, is a law that requires warnings be provided to California consumers when they might be exposed to chemicals identified by California as causing cancer or reproductive toxicity. The warnings are intended to help California consumers make informed decisions about their exposures to these chemicals from the products they use.
